---
title: Weekly quizzes
---




For weeks 2--11, there will be a short Moodle quiz conducted during the seminar. The best 8 of the 10 quizzes will count towards your final mark. Each quiz is worth 1% of your final mark, for a total of 8% overall. 


|Date        |Topic                               |Quiz    |
|:-----------|:-----------------------------------|:-------|
|04 Aug |Time series graphics                |[Week 2](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049177)|
|11 Aug |Time series decomposition           |[Week 3](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049179)|
|18 Aug |Simple forecasting methods          |[Week 4](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049181)|
|25 Aug |Accuracy evaluation                 |[Week 5](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049183)|
|01 Sep |Exponential smoothing               |[Week 6](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049185)|
|08 Sep |Exponential smoothing               |[Week 7](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049187)|
|15 Sep |ARIMA models                        |[Week 8](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049189)|
|29 Sep |ARIMA models                        |[Week 9](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049191)|
|06 Oct |ARIMA models                        |[Week 10](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049193)|
|13 Oct |Multiple regression and forecasting |[Week 11](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049195)|
